chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-607 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.2788/25 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case. 27.10.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Tarique Mubeen Khaskheli, Advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Ateeq-ur-Rehman Soomro, Advocate for the petitioners. He Further submits that after appointments some vacancies are required, for which department is trying to accommodate those candidates, whose names are mentioned in the merit list. For that purpose counsel who is holding brief, does not press the instant petition. Under instructions, instant petition is hereby dismissed, as not pressed. Petitioners are set at liberty to file fresh petitions, if they are not adjusted after above said appointments. Let the answer sheets of District Noushero Feroze and Shaheed Benazir Abad be returned to the authorized officers. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
